SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, URIEL S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $4,232.88 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,367.88, DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION NOT PRESENT. NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED,RE: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
ORIGINAL CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET WITH COPIES OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION RECEIVED FROM THE SHERIFF DEPT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION HEARING SET FOR JAN-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
RETURN OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION SET FOR JAN-02-2009 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
RETURN OF MOTION - CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TAKEN OFF - CALENDAR. THE PARTIES SHALL JOINTLY PARTICIPATE IN THE DISPUTE RESOLUNTION PROCESS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT'S ASSESSMENT COLLECTION POLICY. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION IS VACATED, AND LEVY OF EXECUTION IS QUASHED. ANY FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE DEFENDANT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR LASALLE HEIGHTS HOA. THE CLERK SHALL NOTIFY THE LEVYING OFFICER. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ON JANUARY 12, 2009 IS VACATED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS EXEMPTION HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-2009 IS VACATED SEE ORDER AT LENGHT.
RETURN OF MOTION-GRANTED NOTICE - SENT TO LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
S.F. WRIT RETURNED UNSATISFIED NOT ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM: "A STAY IS OUTSTANDING FOR THE SELECTED WRIT". FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, URIEL S. AS TO DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
